items.example: Have you ever traveled abroad?
We took an early morning flight to Bangkok.
When we arrived, we felt very excited.
We checked in to the hotel at noon.
The market was enormous and very crowded.
I bought some souvenirs for my family.
She wore traditional Thai clothing.
The street food was delicious and cheap.
We ate at a street food stall near the market.
We visited several temples the next day.

items.meaning: ngoạn mục, tuyệt đẹp đến nín thở
items.example: The view from the temple was breathtaking.
The market was enormous and incredibly crowded.
The dance show was truly unforgettable.
We watched a traditional Thai dance show.
Fortunately, we had umbrellas when it rained.

items.meaning: 믿을 수 없을 정도로, tuyệt vời
items.example: The food was incredibly delicious.

items.meaning: phiền, quan tâm (trong câu phủ định)
items.example: We didn't mind the rain because we had umbrellas.
I went to Thailand with friends from university.
I loved the food, especially the pad thai.
She bought traditional clothing as a souvenir.
Mango sticky rice is a famous Thai dessert.
On the last evening, we watched a show.
Everything was new and different in Bangkok.
The buildings of the temples were beautiful.
The whole trip was an amazing experience.
